plugins.name: jira-sprint-workflow
plugins.description: End-to-end Jira sprint workflow for Claude Code teams with a sandbox staging gate before prod. Ships four skills: jira-setup (guided first-time config — opens the Atlassian token page, auto-discovers account ID and projects, validates live), jira-story-design (brainstorm → spec → plan → create 15 self-contained subtasks with a sandbox staging gate), jira-story-execute (autonomously walk the 15-subtask chain to Done, pausing at two human checkpoints — sandbox manual test and merge approval — with full resumability from Jira state), and jira-architect-review (right-sized production-readiness review — 3 / 5 / 7 / 10 angles scaled to the diff, runs pre-sandbox at subtask 7).
